title: Help with the Directors Cut
wikitext:
[]: Help with the Director's Cut             Quote Post by AimuKopfsalat » Wed Mar 01, 2017 3:11 pm The problem is that the DC looks not quite as good as the OA Version on my French Platinum Collection. Here a few Sreenshots: DC http://imgur.com/a/xiOUc OA http://imgur.com/a/ph5Kj DC http://imgur.com/a/8Z65O OA http://imgur.com/a/5vfsy Is this a known issue, and when yes, why tho?

[]: Re: Help with the Director's Cut             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Mar 01, 2017 3:55 pm Mine doesn't have that issue. Are these all taken from the same French Platinum set? Here's what mine looks like, all screenshots taken from the six-disc North American "Platinum Complete" set. http://i.imgur.com/f78PZ5c.jpg

[]: Re: Help with the Director's Cut             Quote Post by AimuKopfsalat » Wed Mar 01, 2017 4:12 pm Yes, all from the same Boxset. For another examaple, my first EVA DVD Box was a bootleg. And even the picture of the bootleg looks better! http://imgur.com/a/mt4bJ
